rationale: compute_supported_apis intersects static SUPPORTED_APIS with per-API capability gates (Log/OffsetStore/GroupCoordinator/Always), wired through Router and Server. Tests cover memory default, missing group/offset backends, and compaction=false non-leakage.

findings.summary: Backend presence is detected via name != "unknown" sentinel rather than an explicit availability flag; works today but is brittle if a real backend ever reports name "unknown".
Router::new still recomputes advertised_apis per call; only Server uses with_advertised_apis. Minor duplication but acceptable for tests.
